executable.description: Backend command and arguments to launch on demand.

working_directory.description: Directory where the backend command runs.

envs.description: Environment entries passed to the backend in KEY=value form.

reverse_proxy_to.description: Upstream address to proxy to, such as 127.0.0.1:8080 or unix//tmp/app.sock.

health_method.description: HTTP method used for readiness checks on non-Unix upstreams.

health_path.description: HTTP path used for readiness checks on non-Unix upstreams.

health_status.description: Exact HTTP status code expected from readiness checks.
